author: lOrm
content: Landed annotations passthrough in src/tools/ask_user.rs. extract_annotations() reads optional top-level 'annotations' field, validates it's a JSON object (else errors with the offending JSON type name), and threads it verbatim into the user_question marker payload alongside questions. Missing field emitted as null so renderers see a stable shape. Added parse_user_question_annotations() helper for downstream consumers, re-exported at tools:: top level. 3 tests pin: round-trip with preview_url/severity/tags / missing annotations emits null / non-object annotations rejected.
